name: search_tools
description: 搜索工具库，根据需求检索匹配的工具
parameters_schema: {"type": "object", "properties": {"query": {"type": "string", "description": "搜索查询"}, "tool_type": {"type": "string", "description": "工具类型过滤 (function_calling/mcp/skills)", "enum": ["function_calling", "mcp", "skills", "all"], "default": "all"}, "category": {"type": "string", "description": "工具类别过滤"}, "limit": {"type": "integer", "description": "返回结果数量限制", "default": 10}}, "required": ["query"]}

name: format_tool_config
description: 格式化工具配置，生成标准格式的工具配置输出
parameters_schema: {"type": "object", "properties": {"tool_ids": {"type": "array", "items": {"type": "string"}, "description": "工具ID列表"}, "include_reasons": {"type": "boolean", "description": "是否包含选择理由", "default": true}}, "required": ["tool_ids"]}
